name: Config recorders not fully enabled
query: { configurationRecorders(where: { OR: [ { hasConfigurationRecorderStatus_NONE: {} }, { hasConfigurationRecorderStatus_SOME: { recording: { eq: false } } }, { recordingGroupAllSupported: { eq: false } }, { recordingGroupIncludeGlobalResourceTypes: { eq: false } } ] }) { ...AssetFragment } }
